message:
fix(handoff/tests): resolve symlinks in test tempdir so macOS writer tests pass

Writer.ensureSafeDir rejects any path that traverses a symlinked
component. On macOS, t.TempDir() returns /var/folders/... but /var is
a symlink to /private/var, so every Writer test in this file failed
with "traverses symlinked component /var".

Add a testTempDir() helper that calls filepath.EvalSymlinks on the
tempdir before returning it, and use it throughout the file. Linux
remains unaffected (/tmp is not a symlink), and the security intent
of ensureSafeDir (blocking user-supplied symlink attacks) is
preserved — we only resolve test-owned dirs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
